name: Docid
summary: Identify and tag documents with stable document IDs.
description: Docid is an if-uri urirun connector for identify and tag documents with stable document IDs. It is represented in the public catalog so the connector can be discovered, versioned and linked to its repository while implementation details are completed.
useCases: Discover Docid capabilities from the connector catalog.
Plan flows that use docid:// URI routes.
Install or track the connector from its GitHub repository.
